name: meeting-notes-summarizer
description: Summarize meeting transcripts into decisions, action items, risks, and follow-up messages.

interface.shortDescription: Summarize meetings into decisions and action items
interface.longDescription: A content-only Codex skill that turns raw transcripts and meeting notes into a concise summary, explicit decisions, owner/action/due-date tables, risks, open questions, and a follow-up message.
defaultPrompt: @Meeting Notes Summarizer summarize this transcript and list action item owners
@Meeting Notes Summarizer turn these notes into decisions, risks, and follow-ups
